name: VALE HARDWARE
subtitle: Hardware · Keys · Repairs
tagline: Maida Vale's neighbourhood hardware shop — keys cut while you wait, fixings, tools, and a friendly word of advice since 1992.
registeredAddress: 8 Clifton Road, London W9 1SZ, United Kingdom
pageTitle: VALE HARDWARE — Hardware, Keys & Repairs in Maida Vale

services.name: Key Cutting
services.desc: House, window, safe, and security keys cut while you wait. Most standard keys done in under five minutes.

services.name: Tool Hire
services.desc: Drills, sanders, wallpaper strippers, and ladders by the day. Bring ID and we'll have you sorted in minutes.

services.name: Lock & Handle Fitting
services.desc: Supply and fit of cylinders, mortice locks, and door handles. Quiet, tidy work with no upsell.

services.name: Picture Hanging & Shelving
services.desc: Solid-wall fixings, floating shelves, and mirror hanging — done right the first time, no cracked plaster.

services.name: Battery & Bulb Supply
services.desc: Every size battery, energy-saving and halogen bulbs, and torch cells. The things you can never find elsewhere.

services.name: Local Delivery
services.desc: Heavy paint, timber, and bulky fixings delivered around Maida Vale same-day for a small flat fee.

about.title: Thirty years on Clifton Road.
paragraphs: VALE HARDWARE opened in 1992 when Len Vale left a chain store to run a proper neighbourhood shop. What began as one counter and a key machine has become Maida Vale's first stop for anything that needs fixing, hanging, or mending.
We don't do hard-sell. We do the right screw, the right advice, and a key cut before your coffee goes cold.
Everyone behind the counter lives locally and knows the terraces, mansion flats, and parade shops of W9 by name. Come in with a photo on your phone — we'll usually know the part.

whyChoose.text: Most keys cut in under five minutes — done while you wait, no appointment needed
30 years on the same street — we'll still be here when the chain stores have moved on
Honest advice, no upsell — if a ten-pence washer will do, we'll tell you
320+ five-star reviews — check our Google profile and see what the neighbours say

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.text: Snapped my only back-door key on a Sunday morning. They cut me a new one in four minutes and refused to overcharge. Lifesavers.

reviews.name: Mr Okafor
reviews.text: Been coming here since 1998. They remembered the odd latch on my 1930s front door. You don't get that at a superstore.

reviews.name: The Delaneys
reviews.text: Hired a floor sander for the weekend, returned it Monday, no fuss. Cheaper than the hire chain and two minutes from home.
